recommendations.overview: Comical trip to Corse reminiscent of A very bad trip.

recommendations.title: God's Own Country
recommendations.overview: A young farmer in rural Yorkshire numbs his daily frustrations with binge drinking and casual sex, until the arrival of a Romanian migrant worker.

recommendations.title: Vamp
recommendations.overview: Two fraternity pledges go to a sleazy bar in search of a stripper for their college friends, unaware it is occupied by vampires.

recommendations.title: Without Saying Goodbye
recommendations.overview: The opposite lives of a workaholic architect and a fiery artist are upended when their chance encounter in breathtaking Peru shifts their views on life.

recommendations.title: Package Tour
recommendations.overview: Stig-Helmer and Ole Bramserud on a trip to the Canary Islands for Christmas.

recommendations.title: The Escort
recommendations.overview: Desperate for a good story, a sex-addicted journalist throws himself into the world of high-class escorts when he starts following a Stanford-educated prostitute.

recommendations.title: Albino Alligator
recommendations.overview: While escaping from a foiled robbery attempt, three thieves find themselves surrounded by police at a New Orleans bar--only they're not the people the police are searching for.
